name: JobApplication
description: A job application links a candidate to a job requisition and tracks their progress through the recruiting stages from application through hire or disposition.

id.description: Workday ID (WID) uniquely identifying the job application

candidate.description: A reference to a related Workday resource

id.description: Workday ID (WID) of the referenced resource

descriptor.description: Display name of the referenced resource

jobRequisition.description: A reference to a related Workday resource

id.description: Workday ID (WID) of the referenced resource

descriptor.description: Display name of the referenced resource

dispositionReason.description: A reference to a related Workday resource

id.description: Workday ID (WID) of the referenced resource

descriptor.description: Display name of the referenced resource

isDispositioned.description: Whether the candidate has been dispositioned

source.description: A reference to a related Workday resource

id.description: Workday ID (WID) of the referenced resource

descriptor.description: Display name of the referenced resource

appliedOn.description: Date and time the application was submitted

updatedOn.description: Timestamp when the application was last updated
